title: trisetaria pumila subsp. fuscescens
intro: Trisetaria pumila subsp. fuscescens, also known as the Dwarf Brome or Black-stemmed Brome, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Trisetaria pumila subsp. fuscescens include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
